title: Senior Teacher - Teach For India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Teach For India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Teach For India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!
